---
title: "J. G. Hincks"
---

## J. G. Hincks

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1865, 68)

### Biography

There are payments to Miss J. G. Hincks in the bank account.  An article in the <i>Anthropological Review</i> 7 (April 1869) was translated from Spanish by J.G.Hincks, and since the <i>MP</i> work deals with Moorish material it is reasonable to see her as an expert on Spain.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
